title: NHRA-MVC Traceability Hub Pharmaceutical Tracking Compliance Circular
summary: Requires agents and invoicers to comply with the NHRA-MVC Traceability Hub for Pharmaceutical Tracking, creating digital product data and traceability obligations in the health sector.

theme_notes.digital_health.health_data: Digital pharmaceutical traceability hub compliance circular.

notes: Related instruments: Related to NHRA pharmaceutical tracking and health data governance
